ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Flavia Papia Sacra opus in quatuor partes divisum.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: In quarum prima Sanctorum omnium Ticini quiescentium Agiologium texitur, ... in secunda breves eorundem sanctorum historiæ ... in tertia de cæteris aliis sanctorum partialibus reliquiis ... in quarta de Langobardorum Regno, ac gestis ... Lucubrato poot authoris decessum indice ... ab eiusdem amico F.J.M.A.S.A., etc. [With a dedicatory epistle subscribed, Prior et F.F.

Essay.EssayTitle: Papia urbs singulis descripta monosticis ab eruditissimo domino I. V. D. Petro Hercule Bellois Bononiensi Academico Gelato In opere M.S. cui titulus Rerum Ticini memorabilium: Exametra Belloiana

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
